actions.text: (-white)This sector has an abundance of geysers making it perfect for Steel production.

(-white)Research the [res://textures/blocks/resource extractors/MineralExtractor.png](-yellow)Mineral Extractor(-white) and place it on a geyser to extract [res://textures/resources/iron.png]Iron.
(-white)You will need to power it.
(-white)Now research and place a [res://textures/blocks/factories/SteelFurnace.png]Steel Furnace to produce [res://textures/resources/steel.png]Steel from [res://textures/resources/iron.png]Iron.

(-white)Research and place the Unit Refabricator with a Fabricator Facing into it to upgrade tier 1 units to tier 2.
(-white)You will need to supply it with the required resources associated with each unit, viewable in the core database.

(-white)You will need to resarch the [res://textures/blocks/turrets/DoubleBarrel/DoubleBarrelComplete.png]Double Barrel and [res://textures/blocks/walls/LargeSteelWall.png]Large Steel Wall then build a defense with them to better attack the enemy's stronger units. make sure to supply them with resources.
(-white)Now command your units and destroy the enemy core.
